name: daily-workbench
description: A personal Electron workspace for tasks, notes, browsing, and terminal workflows.
author: Oracle0703

scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json && tsc -p tsconfig.tools.json
scripts.test:assistant: vitest run tests/assistant-domain.test.ts tests/assistant-components.test.ts tests/assistant-context-builder.test.ts tests/assistant-credential-store.test.ts tests/openai-responses-provider.test.ts tests/assistant-controller.test.ts tests/assistant-ipc-handlers.test.ts tests/ipc-validation.test.ts tests/preload-api.test.ts tests/workspace-ipc-adapter.test.ts tests/fake-responses-server.test.ts
scripts.test:focus: vitest run tests/focus-domain.test.ts tests/v10-schema.test.ts tests/v11-schema.test.ts tests/focus-service.test.ts tests/focus-controller.test.ts tests/focus-state.test.ts tests/focus-components.test.ts tests/focus-ipc-handlers.test.ts tests/workspace-service.test.ts tests/workspace-archive-state.test.ts tests/workspace-archive-components.test.ts tests/workspace-ipc-handlers.test.ts tests/ipc-validation.test.ts tests/preload-api.test.ts tests/database-service.test.ts tests/data-portability-package.test.ts tests/data-portability-database.test.ts tests/workspace-ipc-adapter.test.ts tests/startup-coordinator.test.ts
scripts.test:terminal: vitest run tests/terminal-environment.test.ts tests/terminal-profile-resolver.test.ts tests/wsl-discovery.test.ts tests/terminal-configuration-service.test.ts tests/terminal-preference-repository.test.ts tests/terminal-manager.test.ts tests/terminal-state.test.ts tests/terminal-ipc-handlers.test.ts tests/ipc-validation.test.ts tests/preload-api.test.ts tests/workspace-ipc-adapter.test.ts
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run audit:all && npm run audit:prod && npm run package
